articles.author: Daryna Mayer, Yuliya Talmazan
articles.title: Ukraine's anti-drone tech is in high demand as Iran attacks its neighbors - NBC News
articles.description: KYIV, Ukraine — As the conflict in the Middle East escalates, Ukraine could prove to be an invaluable trove of battle-tested expertise from its own bitter and costly fight against Russia
